use_cases: Settings pages for enabling or disabling features like notifications and dark mode
Feature flags and permission toggles in admin dashboards
Boolean form inputs for collecting user preferences
Quick on/off controls for subscriptions and billing options
ai_summary: A lever-style toggle switch component featuring a mechanical lever design with a knob and base structure. This minimalist switch control enables users to toggle between two binary states with a distinctive lever aesthetic. Commonly used in settings panels, feature flags, and preference configurations. The component provides an alternative to standard checkboxes with a more visual, mechanical appearance.
